nodes.label: P2.0 synth control — dead units / effective rank / goodness-separation diagnostics
nodes.rationale: Same 3-panel layout on synth: dead units only rise to ~0.09 by layer 8 (much milder than CIFAR's 0.47); effective rank still collapses 44->8 (rank-collapse is norm-driven, not dataset-driven) but goodness separation actually rises through mid-depth (peaks ~0.11 at layer 5) before falling -- the 2-class clusters survive the low rank, explaining why probe holds despite erank collapse.
